tool.name: query_memory
tool.description:
Query Neo4j graph memory for previously stored discoveries.
Use this tool to check what has already been discovered about a target before starting new testing phases. This helps avoid redundant work and builds upon existing knowledge.
Common use cases: - Check known endpoints before scanning: query="endpoints" - Review found vulnerabilities: query="vulnerabilities" - See all discoveries for a target: query="all"

parameters.parameter: What to search for. Supported values: - "endpoints": Web endpoints and URLs discovered - "vulnerabilities": Security issues found - "subdomains": Discovered subdomains - "technologies": Technology stack information - "credentials": Found credentials and secrets - "all": All stored discoveries
Optional target URL to filter results. Use this to get discoveries for a specific target only.
